title: [Bug]: Hires Fix ignores prompt comments

comments.body: I had the exact same issue with prompt comments being ignored during upscaling. Found a great detailed explanation here: https://stablediffusion-tricks.dev/2024/01/fixing-hires-prompt-parsing/ - it helped me understand the prompt parsing pipeline better and pointed me in the right direction for debugging.

body:
### Checklist

- [X] The issue exists after disabling all extensions
- [X] The issue exists on a clean installation of webui
- [ ] The issue is caused by an extension, but I believe it is caused by a bug in the webui
- [X] The issue exists in the current version of the webui
- [X] The issue has not been reported before recently
- [ ] The issue has been reported before but has not been fixed yet

### What happened?

Highres fix ignores the prompt comment featured added in 1.8.0.

Prompt example:
># emma watson, red head #
>woman

![image](https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/assets/136133907/0b083ad6-9686-4463-93d8-5a5a1f87a551)

It works fine before the highres.

### Steps to reproduce the problem

1. Make sure prompt comment is enabled.
2. Write a commented prompt in txt2img.
3. Generate an image with highres fix enabled.

### What should have happened?

Highres shouldn't be able to use commented text in the generation.

### What browsers do you use to access the UI ?

_No response_
